# CWE-427: helper binary invoked via absolute path, PATH not mutated.
lang: go
file: CWE-427-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os/exec"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

const pdftopngPath = "/usr/bin/pdftopng"

func RunReportRenderer(c *gin.Context) error {
	cmd := exec.Command(pdftopngPath, c.PostForm("input"))
	return cmd.Run()
}
